---
title: "Research"
---

## Research Interests

Briefly describe your broad research interests here — what questions motivate your work and why they matter.

---

## Publications

### Journal Articles

**Paper Title Here** (2024)  
Your Name, Co-author Name, Co-author Name  
*Journal Name*, vol(issue), pages.  
[[PDF]](#) [[Code]](#) [[DOI]](#)

---

### Conference Papers

**Conference Paper Title** (2023)  
Your Name, Co-author Name  
*Conference Name (VENUE'23)*  
[[PDF]](#) [[Poster]](#)

---

## Working Papers

**Working Paper Title**  
Your Name  
*Brief one-sentence description of what this paper is about.*  
[[Preprint]](#)

---

## Research Projects

### Project Name
A short paragraph describing the project, your role, and its goals. You can include an image or figure here if helpful.

### Another Project
Another short paragraph here.
